files.patch:
@@ -25,46 +25,36 @@ jobs:
 
     - name: Enforce Coverage Threshold (project)
       run: |
-        python - <<'PY'
-import subprocess, sys
-out = subprocess.check_output("go tool cover -func=coverage.out | tail -1 | awk '{print $3}'", shell=True).decode().strip().rstrip('%')
-total = float(out or 0)
-threshold = 80.0
-print(f"Total coverage: {total:.2f}% (threshold {threshold}%)")
-if total < threshold:
-    sys.exit(f"Coverage {total:.2f}% is below threshold {threshold}%")
-PY
+        total=$(go tool cover -func=coverage.out | tail -1 | awk '{print $3}' | tr -d '%')
+        echo "Total coverage: ${total}% (threshold 80%)"
+        awk -v c="$total" 'BEGIN { if (c < 80.0) { printf("Coverage %.2f%% is below 80%%\n", c); exit 1 } }'
 
     - name: Enforce Coverage Thresholds (per-package, coarse)
       run: |
         set -e
-        go tool cover -func=coverage.out | awk '/^beads_viewer\/pkg\// {print $1, $3}' > pkgcov.txt
-        python - <<'PY'
-import sys
-thresholds = {
-    'beads_viewer/pkg/analysis': 90.0,
-    'beads_viewer/pkg/export': 95.0,
-    'beads_viewer/pkg/recipe': 90.0,
-    'beads_viewer/pkg/ui': 70.0,
-    'beads_viewer/pkg/loader': 85.0,
-    'beads_viewer/pkg/updater': 70.0,
-    'beads_viewer/pkg/watcher': 85.0,
-    'beads_viewer/pkg/workspace': 90.0,
-}
-violations = []
-with open('pkgcov.txt') as f:
-    for line in f:
-        path, pct = line.strip().split()
-        pct = float(pct.strip('%'))
-        req = thresholds.get(path)
-        if req is not None and pct < req:
-            violations.append((path, pct, req))
-if violations:
-    for path, pct, req in violations:
-        print(f"Coverage for {path} is {pct:.2f}% (< {req}%)")
-    sys.exit(1)
-print("Per-package thresholds OK")
-PY
+        go tool cover -func=coverage.out | awk '/^github.com\\/Dicklesworthstone\\/beads_viewer\\/pkg\\// {print $1, $3}' > pkgcov.txt
+        while read -r path pct; do
+          pct=${pct%\%}
+          req=
+          case "$path" in
+            github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer/pkg/analysis) req=90 ;;
+            github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer/pkg/export) req=95 ;;
+            github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer/pkg/recipe) req=90 ;;
+            github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer/pkg/ui) req=70 ;;
+            github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer/pkg/loader) req=85 ;;
+            github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer/pkg/updater) req=70 ;;
+            github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer/pkg/watcher) req=85 ;;
+            github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer/pkg/workspace) req=90 ;;
+          esac
+          if [ -n "$req" ]; then
+            below=$(awk -v p="$pct" -v r="$req" 'BEGIN { print (p < r) ? 1 : 0 }')
+            if [ "$below" -eq 1 ]; then
+              echo "Coverage for $path is ${pct}% (< ${req}%)"
+              exit 1
+            fi
+          fi
+        done < pkgcov.txt
+        echo "Per-package thresholds OK"
 
     - name: Coverage Report Artifact
       run: |
